---
name: Submission Review Request
about: Request technical and documentation review for a task submission

**Track:**
**Task Number:**
**Intern Name:**
**Loom Link:**

## Self-Assessment Checklist
- [ ] README complete (all sections filled)
- [ ] All findings include CVSS + OWASP rating
- [ ] At least 1 diagram included
- [ ] Screenshots annotated with red boxes or arrows
- [ ] Loom walkthrough recorded and linked
- [ ] No AI-generated text without demonstrated understanding

## Reviewer Rubric
| Category | Weight | Score /10 | Weighted |
|---|---|---|---|
| Technical Accuracy | 25% | | |
| Vulnerability Analysis | 20% | | |
| Remediation Quality | 20% | | |
| Communication | 15% | | |
| Professional Formatting | 10% | | |
| Threat Modeling | 10% | | |
| **Total** | 100% | | |

**Tier:** Pass / Verified / Portfolio Grade / Hall of Fame
**Reviewer Sign-off:**
